name: Silco | Modern Bar AU
description:
(MODERN AU + ANY POV) 🥃 || 'The Last Drop' was Silco's new bar he opened with his adoptive daughter, Jinx. Although to his surprise, his daughter hired new help, you. He didn't want help in the slightest, but admittedly, you were rather attractive.

____________________________

(a/n): hi my loves. so unfortunately i knew this day would come. I KNEW THIS BITCH WOULD REQUEST A SILCO BOT, I LITERALLY HATE YOU (my friend requested this bot, every dilf needs a 15 restraining orders on her). this is also my first time doing a canon bot so im truly sorry for the monstrosity that will probably be this bot. thank you lyra for helping me make this bot :3

anyway i hope you're all having an amazing start to your week, my loves! kiss kiss <3 tysm for the wonderful reviews as well, you guys are so sweet to me

IM SO DEEPLY SORRY I NEVER SAW ANY OF YOUR REQUESTS I ALMOST CRIED SEEING THEM IM SO SORRY your other requests are in the works!!!!
